name: Cream knit ribbed tank + wide-leg cream knit lounge pants + oversized cream cardigan loungewear set
why: This is exactly what I want to wear right now. A matching cream knit set — ribbed tank, wide-leg lounge pants, oversized cardigan. Soft, warm, minimal. It's the kind of thing you wear on a quiet evening at home when you want to feel put-together but completely comfortable. The cream tones are so calming. I can picture myself in this, curled up with a cup of tea, maybe watching something, or just thinking. It's not trying too hard. It's just soft and warm and mine.
